name: webinar-script
description: Create a complete 60-minute webinar script with slide-by-slide outline, presenter notes, engagement prompts, and a strong pitch close.
input_description: Webinar topic, presenter name and credentials, target audience, core teaching content (3-5 main points), offer being pitched, and price point.
output_description: Full webinar script in Markdown with intro/credibility section, 3-5 content modules with slide titles and speaker notes, Q&A bridge, pitch sequence, objection handling, and closing.
